# Brian Nyambego

> Global personal branding trainer, author of three books, and award-winning public speaker based in Nairobi, Kenya.

Brian Nyambego helps ambitious Africans build personal brands that walk into rooms before they do. His signature is wearing a suit every single day — not as fashion, but as a deliberate personal branding statement. This practice was featured in Pulse Kenya in 2024.

## Identity

- Full name: Brian Nyambego
- Role: Personal Branding Trainer, Author, Speaker
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
- Founded: Dreams Are Valid University
- Serves as: President of The First-borns Circle
- Philosophy: "Before they hear you, they must first see you."
- Hashtag: #IAmNyambego

## Books

- **Becoming an Extraordinaire** (2026) — Personal Branding, AI, Systems and Sales that Convert. Available at Kibanga Books, Nairobi.
- **I Am Super Proud of You** (2025) — Before approval. Before applause. Before permission. A call to self-respect.
- **A Mindset of a Billionaire** (2021) — Written at age 17. Brian's debut.

## Services

- 7-Day Pure Personal Branding Cohort — intensive training covering identity, visual packaging, digital presence, content and monetisation
- 1-on-1 Coaching — direct access to Brian, built around the individual
- Speaking — summits, corporates, institutions across Africa

## Appearances & Recognition

- Featured in Pulse Kenya: "21-year-old trainer turning suits into a personal branding statement" (November 2024)
- Speaker at the Leadership, Entrepreneurship and Technology (LET) Summit, Strathmore University (November 2024)
- Has shared stages with President William Ruto of Kenya
- Inspired by Vusi Thembekwayo and Tony Elumelu
